description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a light stone exterior. The property is surrounded by a low fence and features a spacious outdoor area with a rectangular swimming pool, poolside lounge chairs, and several umbrellas for shade. The front facade has large floor-to-ceiling windows, a balcony with blue glass railings, and a small set of steps leading to the main entrance. The landscaping includes a row of trees along the perimeter, providing privacy and greenery. The house has a minimalist, geometric design with clean lines and a neutral color palette. The rear and side facades are more solid, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, stone exterior, large windows, and a private pool area surrounded by a fence and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, balcony, pool area, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly solid stone wall, minimal windows, and a row of trees along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the pool, poolside furniture, umbrellas, and the back facade with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the large glass windows, balcony, pool, and the main outdoor living space.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small set of steps, minimal overhang, and large glass doors flanked by tall windows.
